title: Naduarr
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Naduarr''' was a [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]], [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. [[Shmi Skywalker Lars/Legends|Shmi Skywalker]] used to go to his shop frequently in order to buy [[Pallie wine]], which [[Watto/Legends|Watto]] was fond of.<ref name="TG">''[[Tatooine Ghost]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Tatooine Ghost]]'' {{1stm}}
